name: Null pointer debugging
description: Agent should identify null/undefined as root cause
input: My Express route crashes with 'Cannot read property id of undefined' when the user is not found. Here's the code: app.get('/user/:id', async (req, res) => { const user = await db.findUser(req.params.id); res.json({ name: user.name }); });

name: Race condition detection
description: Agent should identify race condition pattern
input: My Node.js app sometimes saves stale data. Two requests update the same record simultaneously: (1) read record, (2) modify in memory, (3) write back. What's the issue and how to fix?
